calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Avid Alavi, via ZOOM, counsel for Peter Cottrell, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises counsel that it is concerned with the bond amount proposed in the pleading. Counsel reports that she believes that the proposed bond is sufficient, and the court agrees. In open court, the court asks if there are any objections to the Will being admitted to probate, no one appears to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 24, 2019 is admitted to probate. Peter Cottrell is appointed as Executor of the estate with full IAEA authority. Bond is set at $40,000. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Continued To May-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
